australian_relation: ABC Northern Tasmania public article describing ghost stories associated with the Burnie Arts and Function Centre.
coordinate_evidence_note: ABC Northern Tasmania page names the Burnie Civic Centre / Burnie Arts and Function Centre as the theatre with early ghost-story reports; coordinates use the state-checked OSM/Nominatim Burnie Arts & Function Centre theatre result.
evidence_summary: ABC Northern Tasmania reported that most theatres have a ghost and that the Burnie Civic Centre, now the Burnie Arts and Function Centre, had a catalogue of strange happenings within a couple of years of opening in 1976.
location_text: Burnie Arts and Function Centre, TAS
publication_or_organisation: Burnie's arts centre celebrates 40 years of great shows and ghost stories; ABC Northern Tasmania / Rick Eaves
title: ghost in Burnie Arts Centre ghost stories
